{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/188732809?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/GCXWLP/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/GCXWLP/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/GCXWLP/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/GCXWLP/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/GCXWLP", "id": 188732809, "login": "GCXWLP", "node_id": "U_kgDOCz_ViQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/GCXWLP/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/GCXWLP/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/GCXWLP/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/GCXWLP/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/GCXWLP/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/GCXWLP", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Summary

An authenticated path traversal in `assets/icon` allows local SVG file read by passing traversal sequences in the `extension` parameter. The issue is caused by file existence checks happening before extension validation.

### Details
The endpoint:
- `src/controllers/AssetsController.php:1115-1123`
- `actionIcon(string $extension)` calls `Assets::iconPath($extension)` and returns `sendFile($path, ...)`.

In `Assets::iconPath()`:
- Path is built from user-controlled `extension`:
  - `src/helpers/Assets.php:906-909`
- If `file_exists($path)` is true, path is returned immediately:
  - `src/helpers/Assets.php:910-912`

Validation exists in `Assets::iconSvg()`:
  - `preg_match('/^\w+$/', $extension)`
  - `src/helpers/Assets.php:927-931`

However, that validation is only reached if `iconPath()` does **not** find a file.
So traversal payloads that resolve to existing `.svg` files bypass validation and are served by `sendFile()`.

### Impact

- Authenticated users can read local .svg files accessible to the application process.

### References

- https://github.com/craftcms/cms/commit/30f5f1a8d6edf0f3a00be72c42c78d9dc7d72d5c", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c43v-4cr8-6mvp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T13:44:06Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c43v-4cr8-6mvp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c43v-4cr8-6mvp"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-09T13:44:06Z", "references": ["https://github.com/craftcms/cms/security/advisories/GHSA-c43v-4cr8-6mvp", "https://github.com/craftcms/cms/commit/30f5f1a8d6edf0f3a00be72c42c78d9dc7d72d5c", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c43v-4cr8-6mvp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/craftcms/cms/security-advisories/GHSA-c43v-4cr8-6mvp", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/craftcms/cms", "summary": "Craft CMS has authenticated path traversal in `assets/icon`, allowing local `.svg` file read", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T13:44:07Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c43v-4cr8-6mvp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.17.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "craftcms/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0-RC1, <= 4.17.6"}, {"first_patched_version": "5.9.13", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "craftcms/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.0.0-RC1, <= 5.9.12"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Craft CMS has authenticated path traversal in `assets/icon`, allowing local `.svg` file read
